case.title: AMERICAN PAPER GOODS CO. v. U S

opinion.h4: AMERICAN PAPER GOODS CO. v. U S, (1937)
opinion.h2: AMERICAN PAPER GOODS COMPANY, petitioner, v. The UNITED STATES.* No. 370.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. M. Manning Marcus, of Washington, D. C., for petitioner.
For opinion below, see 19 F. Supp. 537.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Court of Claims denied.
* Rehearing denied 302 U.S. 779, 58 S. Ct. 362, 82 L.Ed. --.[ American Paper Goods Co v. U S (1937) ]
